title: Kanbus clock: unify card layout and centered dim issue IDs

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing requested unified card typography/layout: bytesized headers for all cards, dimmed header tone equal to dim issue-ID tone, centered issue IDs on all event cards (including COMMENT), and consistent vertical spacing restoration for transition/event lines.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented unified card layout pass: default bytesized header/body, dimmed headers matched to dimmed issue-ID line, centered first-line IDs for event cards, and consistent compact spacing across transition/comment/created cards. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (14 passed).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Done: unified event-card typography/layout applied and validated live (bytesized dim headers, centered dim issue-ID line, compact spacing).
